title: augusta rivalis f. glabra
intro: Augusta rivalis f. glabra, also known as Sweet Goldenrod, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Augusta rivalis f. glabra include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
